title: SkillEntry
description: RAG-A entry (schema v2.0). Descriptive knowledge of one skill — building silhouette, floor layout, connector template, wall fitting, room role, or room decoration. Metadata-only entries (the new categories) have python_skill_signature=null; legacy ones reference a Python module in pipeline/skills/<id>.py.

style_affinity.description: Optional. Human-readable note telling the LLM the stylistic character of this skill and which building styles it does/does not fit (e.g. 'East-Asian motif — out of place in Gothic/Modern'). INFORMATIONAL ONLY: the skill is still surfaced; the agent uses this to judge coherence, it is not a hard filter. Absent = style-neutral, fits any building.

schema_version.description: Optional. 1.0 = legacy (no skill_category). 2.0 = v4 BOT-aware. Absent treated as 1.0.

skill_category.description: v4 BOT-aware category. global_silhouette consumed by global_designer; floor_layout by space_planner + floor_planner; connector_template by space_planner; wall_fitting by architecture_planner; room_role by floor_planner + room_agent; room_decoration by room_agent; exterior_feature by exterior_agent. Absent on legacy entries (treat as room_role for back-compat).

applicable_to.description: Building categories where this skill is appropriate. Used by agents to filter skill candidates by category.

parameters.description: Structured hints for the agent consuming this skill. Free-form keys per skill_category (e.g. footprint_shape for global_silhouette, corridor_width for floor_layout).

python_skill_signature.description: Reference to the dispatchable Python skill function signature. null = metadata-only skill (no Python implementation; the consuming agent uses this entry as inspiration/pattern).
